entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.), an allotetraploid legume crop.

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming nitrogen-fixing root nodules in legumes.

entities.name: AHNSP2-B07
entities.description: A GRAS transcription factor gene (also known as Nb) controlling nodulation in peanut.

entities.name: AHNSP2-A08
entities.description: A GRAS transcription factor gene (also known as Na) controlling nodulation in peanut.

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: A genetic mapping technique used to identify the genes controlling nodulation.

entities.name: QTL-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing-based approach used to identify quantitative trait loci for nodulation.

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form, facilitated by root nodules.

entities.name: MENDELIAN INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of genetic inheritance followed by the AHNSP2-A08 gene.

entities.name: NON-MENDELIAN INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of genetic inheritance followed by the AHNSP2-B07 gene.

entities.name: NODULE ORGANOGENESIS
entities.description: The biological process of root nodule development.

entities.name: ALLOTETRAPLOID
entities.description: A type of polyploidy where sets of chromosomes are derived from different species, as seen in peanut.

entities.name: GRAS TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR GENES
entities.description: A family of transcription factor genes that include AHNSP2-B07 and AHNSP2-A08.
